title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Securities

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at HDFC Securities
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
